calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2004 Continued To Oct-25-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearances by the Defendant: Pauline Fairbanks and Defaulted Defendant: David Wood, Sr.
9:38 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Allyn Hayes, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Fourteen day notice dtd. 8-11-04-----------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 25 Santos St., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Back rent and per diem damages $1,712.15
Costs per cost bill, for a total of $1,712.15
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Assigned To Trial Court
